summary: Real Next app Playwright run passed 3 live-surface tests for the G001 8-gap verification gate.

actions.assertion: Revenue Desk rendered in the real Next app

actions.selector: getByLabel('네이버 쇼핑 URL') / getByRole('button', { name: 'URL 정보 가져오기' })
actions.assertion: Successful import copy rendered before blocked retry
Exact 수동 입력으로 등록하세요 copy visible after PRODUCT_IMPORT_BLOCKED
Content Factory package detail rendered in the real Next app

actions.selector: getByLabel('중위험 무시 사유') / getByRole('button', { name: '사유 입력 후 무시' })
actions.assertion: Empty reason blocked, owner reason posted and rendered in audit metadata
HQ Kanban rendered in the real Next app

actions.target: assigned package card to compliance column
actions.assertion: Returned owner_approval_required status rendered as 승인 필요
Non-uniform live web UI screenshots captured

tests.name: implemented products page reports import success and fail-closed manual fallback
steps: Open /products in the real Next app.
Mock only API routes with page.route.
Submit a Naver Shopping URL and assert successful import copy.
Submit again with PRODUCT_IMPORT_BLOCKED crawler_unavailable and assert exact manual fallback copy.

tests.name: implemented content compliance page requires medium dismissal reason and renders audit
steps: Open /packages/pkg_medium in the real Next app.
Attempt medium issue dismissal without a reason and assert validation copy.
Submit owner-entered reason with CSRF header assertion.
Assert dismissal audit reason is rendered.

tests.name: implemented HQ kanban drag invokes compliance side effect and displays returned status
steps: Open / in the real Next app.
Drag assigned package card to the compliance column.
Assert PATCH body requests compliance_checked and carries CSRF.
Mock API returns owner_approval_required and assert returned-status success copy plus moved card.
